

```{r}

## Setup Code
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
## Plot of rates
p1 <- final_map_data |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill=confirmed_rate_per_1000)) + # Gives the shapes and fills them
    geom_sf_label(aes(label=CounDist), size=2.5)+
    scale_fill_viridis() +
    labs(title="Confirmed Rodent Call Rate") +
    theme_bw()

p2 <- final_map_data |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill=report_rate_per_1000)) +
        geom_sf_label(aes(label=CounDist), size=2.5)+
    scale_fill_viridis() +
    labs(title="Total Rodent Call Rate") +
    theme_bw()

p1+p2
```
